haitian-fried-chicken.name: Haitian Fried Chicken
instructions: Combine chicken legs, lemon juice, onion, garlic, seasoned salt, paprika, thyme, pepper, and cloves in a large bowl. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to 12 hours.

Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan over medium-high heat. Fry chicken in batches until golden brown, about 8 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C). Drain on paper towels.

hake-to-poveira-teleculinaria.name: Hake To Poveira
instructions: Peel the potatoes, cut them in buds and bake them together with the eggs and the grells in salted water. Drain everything and reserve. Light a frying pan with a thread of olive oil and chopped garlic teeth, add the grills and let it saute.
Light a pot with seasoned water with salt and pepper and let it boil. Add the laurel and the hake posts and let it boil. Drain and reserve.
Descasque e pique finamente a cebola e aloure-a num tacho com o restante azeite e o colorau. Adicione o vinagre, tempere com sal e pimenta e retire do lume.

Cut the bread into slices and dispose of them in a large and deep clay dish. Water them with some of the previous sauce, cover them with the hake posts and, at intervals, place potatoes, grelos and eggs cut into slices. Water with the rest of the sauce and serve.

halloween-mummy-cupcakes.name: Halloween Mummy Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line two 12-cup muffin tins with paper liners, preferable dark-colored or Halloween-themed ones.

Combine cake mix, water, eggs, and oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on low speed until moistened, about 30 seconds. Beat at medium speed until batter is smooth and creamy, about 2 minutes. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 3/4 full.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 18 to 21 minutes. Remove from oven and cool tins on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Remove cupcakes from the tins and cool completely on a wire rack before decorating, about 1 hour.

Spoon frosting in an pastry bag or a plastic bag with the corner cut off. Pipe strands of frosting onto the top and bottom of the cupcakes, leaving an oval eye shape exposed in the middle. Pipe 2 dots in the exposed middle for the mummy's eyes. Place 2 chocolate chips flat-side up in the middle of each dot for the pupils.

ham-soup-teleculinaria.name: Ham Soup
instructions: Cut the intermeada into strips, the cubed ham and the sausage in slices.
Heat the oil in a pot and fry the previous meats.
Peel and pinch the onions and garlic, add to the pot and let it saute slightly. Add the potatoes, peeled and cubed, and cover with water. Let boil and cook for 10 minutes.
Then add the coarsely cut cabbage, pasta and beans. Season with salt, stir and let cook for another 12 minutes. Serve hot.

hand-salad-with-buttermilk-grapefruit-an.name: Hand Salad With Buttermilk, Grapefruit, And Mixed Seeds
instructions: Toast coriander seeds and fennel seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, shaking often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool. Using the side of a chef’s knife, lightly crush spices on a cutting board. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in garlic, lemon zest, and cream. Cover and chill 1 hour.
Strain infused cream through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; add buttermilk and whisk until soft peaks form. Season with salt, then mix in grated chile.
Whisk grapefruit juice, lemon juice, vinegar, and ginger in a large bowl and season with salt. Add lettuce wedges to bowl, season with salt, and toss to coat. Arrange lettuce wedges on a platter.
Using a small spoon, swipe some infused cream over lettuce wedges. Sprinkle with half of assorted seeds, then drizzle with oil and top with Aleppo-style pepper and grapefruit zest.
Sprinkle remaining assorted seeds over remaining infused cream and serve alongside lettuce wedges for dipping.

hand-salad-with-yogurt-lemon-dressing.name: Hand Salad With Yogurt-lemon Dressing
instructions: Whisk yogurt, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a small bowl; taste and adjust seasonings and lemon juice, if needed.
Arrange romaine leaves in a bowl and serve with yogurt-lemon dressing alongside for dipping.

hawaiian-mochiko-chicken.name: Hawaiian Mochiko Chicken
instructions: Mix sugar, mochiko, cornstarch, and salt together in a bowl.
Whisk eggs, green onions, soy sauce, sesame seeds, and garlic together in a bowl. Whisk into the flour mixture to form a smooth batter.
Stir chicken strips gently into the batter. Marinate in the refrigerator, 4 hours to overnight.

Fill a deep saucepan with 1 1/2 inches oil; heat over medium heat. Fry chicken strips in batches in hot oil, turning occasionally, until golden brown and no longer pink in the center, about 7 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

hawaiian-rib-eye-steak.name: Hawaiian Rib-eye Steak
instructions: Whisk pineapple juice, soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, and oil in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved. Add onion and ginger. Set aside 2 Tbsp. marinade for butter. Transfer remaining marinade to a large resealable plastic bag. Add steaks and seal bag, pressing out excess air. Chill at least 1 day.
Remove steaks from marinade, pat dry, and let sit until room temperature, about 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Steaks can be marinated 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Whisk butter and oil in a medium bowl to combine. Vigorously whisk in reserved marinade; season with salt. Transfer to the center of a sheet of parchment paper and roll up into a log. Chill until firm, at least 1 hour.

Build a two-zone fire in a charcoal grill for direct (medium-high coals) and indirect (medium-low coals) heat. Alternatively, heat a gas grill to high just before cooking, leaving one burner on low. Season steaks very lightly with salt (omit this step if marinating more than 24 hours). Grill over high heat, turning, until steaks are well browned and beginning to char around edges, about 4 minutes. Transfer to cooler part of grill and continue to cook until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of steaks registers 120° for medium-rare. (Alternatively, cook in a grill pan over medium-high heat, turning steaks every couple of minutes.)
Transfer steaks to a wire rack. Slice butter into ¼"-thick rounds and divide between steaks. Let rest at least 10 minutes before slicing.
Do Ahead: Butter can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

healthier-banana-crumb-muffins.name: Healthier Banana Crumb Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly grease 10 muffin cups or line with paper liners.

Combine 1 ½ cups flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Beat bananas, ⅓ cup melted butter, white sugar, and egg in separate bowl; stir into flour mixture just until moistened. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups.
Combine brown sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, and cinnamon in a small bowl; cut in 1 tablespoon butter with a fork until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Sprinkle over muffins.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and tops spring back when lightly pressed, 18 to 20 minutes.

herbal-mushroom-hot-pot-broth.name: Herbal Mushroom Hot Pot Broth

ingredients.prep: king oyster, and/or portobello), thinly sliced
coarsely chopped, plus more cut into 3" pieces for serving

ingredients.item: White rock sugar or 1 tbsp. granulated sugar
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over high. Cook fresh mushrooms, stirring occasionally, until browned, 5–8 minutes. Add onions, shallots, garlic, and chopped scallions. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are softened and lightly browned, 12–15 minutes.

Add cabbage, leeks, ginger, and wine; cook, stirring, until cabbage is softened, 5–8 minutes. Add dried shiitakes, rock sugar, 3 jujubes, ⅛ oz. dang gui, and 2 Tbsp. goji berries. Pour in 10 cups cold water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover pot and cook, adjusting heat as needed to maintain a gentle boil, 1 hour.

Scoop out solids from broth with a fine-mesh sieve, pressing with a spoon to extract as much liquid as possible. Pick out mushrooms and set aside in a small bowl for serving; discard remaining solids.

Stir 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt into broth; taste and season with more salt if needed. Top with more jujubes, dang gui, goji berries, and scallions.
Do ahead: Broth (without toppings) can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

hirsheimers-hot-sweet-mustard.name: Hirsheimer's Hot & Sweet Mustard
instructions: Whisk brown sugar and mustard powder in a large bowl to combine. Add vinegar and honey; whisk well. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large metal bowl. Add eggs and whisk until blended.

Set bowl with mustard mixture over a large saucepan of gently simmering water (do not allow bottom of bowl to touch water; eggs may scramble). Cook, whisking and scraping bottom of bowl frequently, until mustard is thick and an instantread thermometer registers 71°C, about 5 minutes.
Divide mustard among jars. Screw on lids and chill. DO AHEAD: Mustard can be made 2 weeks ahead. Keep refrigerated for up to 2 months.

honey-lime-chicken-and-avocado-salad.name: Honey-lime Chicken And Avocado Salad
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients for the chicken marinade.
Toss in the chicken thighs and marinate for at least one hour.
In a cast-iron skillet, cook chicken on high heat until there is a nice sear on the surface of the chicken, and the inside is no longer pink. Roughly four minutes each side. Set chicken aside.
Place chopped lettuce, tomatoes, red onion, and avocados in a large salad bowl.
Slice cooked chicken thighs and add to the salad bowl.
In a small bowl, combine all the ingredients for the dressing. Mix well.
Toss the salad with the dressing and serve immediately.
Enjoy!

hot-smoked-salmon-with-yogurt-and-fennel.name: Hot-smoked Salmon With Yogurt And Fennel
instructions: Mix yogurt and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt.
Mix mustard, capers, and 2 Tbsp. oil in another small bowl. Set dressing aside.

Cut fennel stems away from bulb, then cut fronds away from stems; you’ll use each part, but they’re prepped separately. Thinly slice stems crosswise and place in a medium bowl. Coarsely tear fennel fronds until you have about 1 cup and add to bowl. Remove tough outer layers from fennel bulb; discard. Slice bulb in half, then thinly slice crosswise; add to bowl. Add 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, season with salt, and toss to coat.

Divide seasoned yogurt among plates and use a spoon to spread it out. Using your hands, break salmon into big flakes and arrange over yogurt. Spoon mustard dressing over salmon and scatter fennel salad on top. Drizzle with more oil and season with lots of pepper.

hound-dog-bites.name: Hound Dog Bites
instructions: Stir the brown sugar, water, and maple syrup together in a saucepan until the sugar has dissolved. Bring to a boil, and reduce heat to medium low to keep warm.
Mix the marshmallow creme with the peanut butter in a large bowl, and pour the brown sugar mixture over the peanut butter mixture.
With an electric mixer, beat the mixture until fluffy. Refrigerate the fluff.
To make the bites, lay a tortilla out onto a work surface. Spread a thin layer of peanut butter fluff onto the tortilla, leaving an edge about 1/4 inch wide all the way around free from spread.
Sprinkle about 1 1/2 tablespoons of frosted flake cereal over the spread.
Lay a banana along one side of the tortilla; if 1 banana is too short to reach the entire length of the tortilla, use 1 1/2 bananas. Tightly roll the tortilla around the banana.
With a sharp serrated knife, cut the roll into 1/2-inch thick slices. Lay the slices out flat on waxed paper.

Place the chocolate almond bark into a microwave-safe bowl, and microwave for 1 minute; stir the chocolate coating, and continue microwaving at 30-second intervals and stirring until the coating is smooth and warm (not hot).
Dip the bottom of a slice into the coating, covering about 2/3 of the height of the slice. Place the dipped slice coated side down on a sheet of waxed paper to set. Repeat with remaining slices.
Place slices into refrigerator to chill.
Place the remaining cereal flakes in a shallow bowl, and lightly crush them.

Dip the other side of the slices into the chocolate coating, and immediately dip the coated area into the crushed flakes. Place the rolls onto waxed paper, flake sides up. Chill the pieces in the refrigerator until the tops have set up.

how-to-make-a-crispy-apple-palm-comedera.name: How To Make A Crispy Apple Palm
how-to-make-a-crispy-apple-palm-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer una crujiente palmera de manzana

ingredients.item: 1 plate with rectangular plate mass (about 250 g)
1  manzana grande tipo fuji, gala o golden
2 cds of white sugar to caramelize
1 cda de nueces o almendras picadas (opcional para textura)

instructions: Peel the apple and cut it into small cubes. In a frying pan with medium heat melt butter and add apple with brown sugar, cinnamon, pint of salt and lemon juice.
Jumping for 6 to 8 minutes until the apple is soft and slightly caramelized. Add honey and vanilla, mix well and remove from fire. Let completely cool.
Expand paddle mass onto a slightly pitted surface. Sprinkle white sugar onto the surface.
Redistribute apple mixture onto mass by avoiding edges to facilitate rolling. If you wish an extra crispy touch, add the nuts or minced almonds.
Enrollar ambos extremos largos de la masa hacia el centro hasta que se encuentren en el medio. Presionar suavemente para compactar.
Refrigerate the roll for 10 minutes to make it easier to cut. Then cut cuts about 1.5 cm.
Colocar las piezas en una bandeja con papel de horno dejando espacio entre ellas.
To purify the oven at 200-3 and bake for 12 minutes. Carefully turn each palm and bake another 10 to 13 minutes till they are golden and caramelized.
Retirar del horno y dejar enfriar sobre una rejilla para que el caramelo se vuelva crujiente.

how-to-make-a-delicious-chili-lime-vinai.name: How To Make A Delicious Chili Lime Vinaigrette
how-to-make-a-delicious-chili-lime-vinai.original_name: Cómo hacer una deliciosa vinagreta de chile y lima

ingredients.item: 3 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

In a bowl, mix olive oil, minced red chili, lime juice, crushed garlic and honey.
Agrega sal y pimienta al gusto.
Tap the mixture vigorously to achieve a homogenous consistency. You can have a food mixer or processor.
Test and adjust the condiments as you prefer. At this point, we recommend passing the mixture through a food beer to remove any residue. The last step is optional.

how-to-make-a-nutritious-liver-scam-come.name: How To Make A Nutritious Liver Scam
how-to-make-a-nutritious-liver-scam-come.original_name: Cómo hacer un nutritivo estafado de hígado
instructions: Wash your liver under cold water and dry them well. Cut the liver into pieces of a uniform size and have salt and pepper.
In a large saucer, heat up some olive oil with medium-high heat. Add the liver pieces and dold them slightly from all sides. Take his liver back and put it back.
In the same saucer, add a little more oil if necessary and reduce fire by half. Fry onion, garlic, carrots and pepper until tender, about 8-10 minutes.
Add minced tomatoes, laurel, pimenton and cumin. Cooking everything together for about 5 minutes, allowing flavors to blend.
Fold the stock and the red wine (if you use them) into the saucer. Take the mixture to boiling, then reduce the fire and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
The liver cuts back to the saucer and mix well. Cover and cook with low heat for 20- 25 minutes, or till the liver's well cooked but still tender. It rectifies the season with salt and pepper.
Retract from the fire and let rest a few minutes before serving. Decorate with minced fresh parsley and come with rice, potatoes or bread.

how-to-make-almond-garlic-dressing-comed.name: How To Make Almond Garlic Dressing
how-to-make-almond-garlic-dressing-comed.original_name: Cómo hacer aderezo de almendras y ajo

Take his teeth with garlic and his hair and his steak.
After that time, add the hydrated almond into a processor or blender and incorporates garlic teeth, two tablespoons of tahi and olive oil.
It's good till all the ingredients are mixed and you have a smooth and smooth text.
Put the dressing into a cover and lead to the refrigerator. Let them cool so they compact a little more and they'll be ready to use.

how-to-make-baked-lamb-chops-comedera.name: How To Make Baked Lamb Chops
how-to-make-baked-lamb-chops-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer chuletas de cordero al horno

Ahora nos ocuparemos de las patatas. Vamos a pelarlas y a cortarlas forma de gajo.
We will also prepare parsley to use. We'll wash them well and we'll scold them and we'll mingle them.

To continue, we will require an oven-suitable, good size container. It can be a Pyrex-type package or a high temperature-resistant casserole. Here we will put a good jet of oil and add the chopped garlic. We will also add a small teaspoon of oregano and another of rosemary branches. We'll mix well.

Luego,  pasaremos las chuletas al recipiente para horno, y las frotaremos de ambos lados para cubrirlas con el aceite preparado. Posteriormente haremos lo mismo con los trozos de patatas. Si lo desean, pueden ayudarse con una brocha o pincel de cocina, para engrasar bien las chuletas y las verduras.
Finalmente, salpimentaremos las chuletas y las patatas.
Luego, vamos a verter el vino sobre todos los ingredientes.

The following is to get the bottle with its chops into the pressurized oven and let it cook for half an hour. At half that time, we'll come back to the oven to turn the chops and potatoes and water them all with the cooking juice.

how-to-make-bbq-style-pulled-chicken-san.name: How To Make Bbq-style Pulled Chicken Sandwich
how-to-make-bbq-style-pulled-chicken-san.original_name: Cómo hacer sándwich de pulled chicken al estilo BBQ

Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto, el ajo en polvo y tres cucharadas de salsa barbacoa. Mezcla y deja marinar por 20 minutos.
After that time, put your thighs on a plate and bake for about 40 minutes at about 180 ° C till they are cooked and tender.

how-to-make-breaded-chicken-milanese-wit.name: How To Make Breaded Chicken Milanese With Mushroom Sauce
how-to-make-breaded-chicken-milanese-wit.original_name: Cómo hacer milanesa de pollo empanizada con salsa de champiñones

Mezcla el pan rallado con las hierbas provenzales y esparce en un plato.
Esparce en otro plato la harina de trigo.
Warm up a frying pan with vegetable oil till hot.
Pass the milanese through the wheat flour, then through the eggs and finally into the frosted bread mix.
Once they are empanized, cold till they are golden and juicy inside.
Coloca en papel absorbente para retirar el exceso de aceite.

Fry your garlic teeth by the onion for a minute.
It incorporates mushrooms and pits till they release their juice.
Vierte el vino blanco, mezcla y cuece hasta que evapore el alcohol.
Fold the chicken stock, mix and reduce the fluid.
Incorpora la crema de leche y sazona con sal y pimienta. Mezcla muy bien y cocina a fuego bajo hasta que quede una salsa cremosa.
Ajusta de sal y pimienta, y apaga.
Serves the milanese and baits with the mushroom sauce. Be with your favorite garrison.

how-to-make-carapulcra-comedera.name: How To Make Carapulcra

It pits onion into small cubes.
Tritura los ajos hasta hacer una pasta con ellos.
That's how bad you're gonna get. Do your best to remove the seeds first.
For peanuts and cookies, you have to mingle them with a mortar for instance.
Reserva todo y comencemos a cocinar.
Warm up a medium frying pan and dorate a dry potato for a few minutes.
Remove it from the fire and pass it to a water bowl to get damaged.
Una vez hidratada deja que se escurra.
A pot adds vegetable oil, lays fire at high temperature and puts pork previously seasoned with salt and pepper. Do good. When it's been done, get ready.

Ahora vas a volver a poner la papa en la olla. Revuelve bien.
Comienza a agregar el caldo poco a poco mezclando constantemente para que se vaya formando una salsa ligeramente espesa.
Put the peanuts and cookies you had been shredded earlier. Cooking for a few minutes.
Finalmente agrega la carne de cerdo ya cocinada. Dejar hervir un par de minutos y listo.
Disfruta de la carapulcra.

how-to-make-chicken-locrio-comedera.name: How To Make Chicken Locrio

ingredients.item: 800 g chicken cut into small pieces (using breast and thighs for better taste)
50 gr de aceitunas sin hueso ((puede ser negra o verde))

instructions: To bowl we place the pieces of chicken, we add salt, pepper, oregano, capers and olives. We scroll till all the chicken takes after the spices and we'll leave marines for 30 minutes.
We cut carrot, pimenton, cellery and onion into julians or strips.
A frying pan with oil and add the vegetables to them and get them drunk. Later, add the chicken and stir.
After 3 minutes of sniffing chicken with vegetables, we will add sugar. The idea of this step is to be caramelized till I have a dark or golden color. It proceeds to incorporate tomato and stir.
When our chicken's perfectly seasoned, add a cup of rice and we'll drink it to get it into with the chicken mix. We'll cook for two minutes.
Pasado ese tiempo, vierte las dos tasas de agua, revolvemos y bajamos el fuego para el pollo y el arroz se cocine.

Once the liquid's been reduced, we'll cover and finish cooking for 10 minutes. Then we remove the cover and scramble with a spoon, add the peas and parsley, cover them again and we'll let our chicken place finish his cooking for another 5 minutes.

Following those minutes, try the rice to determine its texture, it should be tender and soft. That production was regularly creamy and rice would be & quot; free & quot;. If you think she's missing cooking, leave it for about five more minutes.
Serves warm with banana or mature frits and avocado.

how-to-make-creamy-tuna-salad-at-home-co.name: How To Make Creamy Tuna Salad At Home
how-to-make-creamy-tuna-salad-at-home-co.original_name: Cómo hacer ensalada cremosa de atún en casa
instructions: Comienza lavando, pelando y picando las zanahorias y las papas en cuadritos.

In a pot with high heat, we put with 2-3 cups of water. Add a pint of salt and wait for it to sink. When she breaks the heather she adds the cheeses, 4 minutes after the carrot and 4 minutes after the potato.
Cooking for 10 minutes or till the vegetables are soft. Retire from the fire, put down water and save the vegetables.
A salad bowl serves the cream and mayonnaise. Mix until the ingredients are integrated evenly.
Add (leaked) tuna to bowl and mix with dressing. When integrated, add the vegetables and mix back to integrate all the ingredients.
Sirve la ensalada y disfruta.

how-to-make-crispy-baked-potatoes-comede.name: How To Make Chrispy Baked Potatoes
how-to-make-crispy-baked-potatoes-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer papas crujientes al horno
instructions: Preheat oven at 200 ° C
Wash the potatoes well to remove any impurity from the shells.
Warm up a pot with water. When she's breaking the heather, she incorporates the potatoes.
Cooking for 10 minutes or till they're at the dente. Once baked, remove and draw from the pot.
Put the potatoes into a bowl, bowl with olive oil, garlic and onion powder.
It incorporates the rosemary, salt and pepper to taste.
Mix very well till they are seasoned.
Put the potatoes onto a plate with paper to bake. It's important that you leave space with them.
With the help of a glass, pits a little while, leaving a thought of about ¼ cm.
Take the potatoes to the oven and baker for about 15 minutes. Then turn them around and finish with 5 more minutes or till they get crispy.
Withdraw from the oven and enjoy.

how-to-make-espresso-and-amaretto-sorbet.name: How To Make Espresso And Amaretto Sorbet
how-to-make-espresso-and-amaretto-sorbet.original_name: Cómo hacer sorbete de espresso y amaretto
instructions: Prepare the espresso to suit you well and let it cool at room temperature.
Mix water with sugar into a small pot or saucer and lead to fire.
Cooking at medium heat - low till a light syrup forms. Let cool down.
Mix the syrup, espresso, pint of salt and amaretto till everything's well integrated.
Pass the mixture to a metal container and lead to a freezer for about 4 hours.
Each 30 minutes, remove the mixture to get an ideal Sorbet texture, also to break the crystals and do not tighten.
Once ready, serve and add powder cocoa to decorate.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-grilled-chicken-breasts-with.name: How To Make Grilled Chicken Breasts With Miso Sauce
how-to-make-grilled-chicken-breasts-with.original_name: Cómo hacer pechugas de pollo a la plancha con salsa de miso

ingredients.item: 1 cda de mirin (o vino de arroz dulce)
1 cdite of chewed or brunette sugar

instructions: He steamed his breasts with salt and pepper on both sides and bathed with olive oil.
Warm up a frying pan and have his breasts pitted for 5 minutes each side.
While the chicken is tipped, mix into a small bowl the white miso, myrin, soybean sauce, cut garlic, chewed sugar and water.
When the breasts are already golden and juicy, pour the sauce and finish cooking for about 4 minutes to impregnate the taste.
Once ready, turn off and serve the breasts with the salsa to make them juicy. Be with your favorite garrison.

how-to-make-pappardelle-with-ricotta-and.name: How To Make Pappardelle With Ricotta And Fresh Spinach
how-to-make-pappardelle-with-ricotta-and.original_name: Cómo hacer pappardelle con ricotta y espinacas frescas
instructions: Cuece la pasta en agua con sal hasta que quede al dente. Para lograrlo, sigue las instrucciones del empaque.
Drain the dough and reserve 80 ml of cooking water.
Warm up a large frying pan and melt butter with olive oil.
Incorpora los dientes de ajo junto a la cebolla y saltea sin dejar quemar.
Add the spinach and leap for about 2 minutes.
Agrega la ricota, la nuez moscada, sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien.
Fold the cooking water from the pasta and mix till a creamy sauce forms.
Incorporate the dough into the frying pan and mix carefully until impregnates with the sauce.
Retirement with salt and pepper. Serves and goes with parmesan cheese.

how-to-make-polenta.name: How To Make Polenta
instructions: Bring water and salt to a boil in a large saucepan; pour polenta slowly into boiling water, whisking constantly until there are no lumps.

Reduce heat to low and simmer, whisking often, until polenta starts to thicken, about 5 minutes. Polenta mixture should still be slightly loose. Cover and cook for 30 minutes, whisking every 5 to 6 minutes. When polenta is too thick to whisk, stir with a wooden spoon. Polenta is done when texture is creamy and the individual grains are tender. Cooking time will depend on the polenta grind.

Turn off heat and gently stir 2 tablespoons butter into polenta until butter partially melts; mix 1/2 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese into polenta until cheese has melted. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes to thicken.
Stir polenta and transfer to a serving bowl. Top polenta with remaining 1 tablespoon butter and about 1 tablespoon freshly grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese for garnish.

how-to-make-squid-in-almond-sauce-comede.name: How To Make Squid In Almond Sauce

In the same frying pan, pour the white wine and let the alcohol evaporate.

how-to-make-turkish-pasta-at-home-step-b.name: How To Make Turkish Pasta At Home: Step By Step
how-to-make-turkish-pasta-at-home-step-b.original_name: Cómo hacer pasta turca en casa: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 180 gr de pasta corta o larga tipo rigatoni, fusilli o spaghetti
250 gr de carne molida de res
60 gr de cebolla blanca finamente picada
15 ml de aceite de oliva o mantequilla clarificada
200 g of whole natural yogurt without sugar
1   diente de ajo rallado o machacado

instructions: Take a large pot with abundant water to boiling. Add the salt and cook the dough as instructed by the manufacturer until the dente. Reserve a cup of cooking water and run.
In a large frying pan, heat up olive oil or clarified butter. Soften onion with medium heat till translucent and slightly golden.
Add the minced garlic and cook briefly till it scattering, preventing its burning.
Incorporate ground meat and cook with medium-high heat, crumbling well to achieve a loose texture.
Add the cumin, pepper, sweet peppermint, parrot and cinnamon and salt. Mix well and cook till the meat is well golden and focused on flavour. Reserve hot.
In a bowl, mix yogurt with frosted garlic, lemon juice and salt. Bat slightly to get a smooth and creamy sauce. Keep at room temperature.
In a small bowl, melt butter with low heat. When you start to moist, add the sweet pimenton, smoked pimenton and parrot. Immediately remove from the fire to prevent the pimenton from burning.
Mix hot dough with ground meat. If necessary, add some of the cooking water to purify.
Serve the dough into a good plate, cover with yogurt sauce and end with hot peppermint butter above.
Decorar con hierbas frescas y nueces tostadas si se desea.

how-to-prepare-arabic-bread-at-home-come.name: How To Prepare Arabic Bread At Home
how-to-prepare-arabic-bread-at-home-come.original_name: Cómo preparar pan árabe en casa
instructions: In a big bowl, it combines water, yeast and sugar. Revels till all the ingredients are dissolved. Add ½ cup of flour and let rest for 15 minutes (until the mixture starts to form foam).
Add oil, salt and 2 more cups of flour (saving ½ cup). Revolves with a spoon in a way till a mass forms.
On a clear work surface, sprinkle some flour and amase the mixture until smooth and elastic, about 7 minutes. If the dough's too sticky, add a little more flour and amase till fully integrated.
When the dough is soft and moist, cover with a fabric and let rest for 10 minutes.
Transfer the dough to a clear big bowl and cover with a plastic wrapper. It leaves in a warm place until the mass sponge and double its size about 1 hour.
Go back to the clean work surface and sprinkle flour. Take out the dough and place it onto the surface. Divide into 8 pieces and shape balls. Cover them with a towel and let them rest for 10 minutes.
With the help of a roller creates 6 mm thick circle by 15-20 cm wide, sprinkle flour if it starts to stick.
Preheat your oven at 260ºC and place a large frying pan or pizza stone inside.

Working as quickly as possible, open the oven and place the loaves that fit into the frying pan or the stone, without touching them. Let bake till an air bag forms and the pita starts to get golden, about 3 to 5 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining loaves. Cover the baked Arabic bread with a clean kitchen cloth to keep them hot.

hummus-caesar-salad.name: Hummus Caesar Salad
instructions: Make the hummus Caesar dressing: In a medium bowl, combine 4 tablespoons of hummus, the mustard, garlic, nutritional yeast, capers, lemon juice, miso, and olive oil. Whisk until fully combined. Add another tablespoon of hummus if the dressing is looser than your desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper to taste. The dressing will keep in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.

Make the salad: Add the greens to a large serving bowl and lightly season with lemon juice and salt. Generously drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to coat. Finish with more black pepper, as desired.
Enjoy!
